data.title: Didero raises $30 million to expand AI procurement software
data.description: Didero plans to use the proceeds to expand product development, engineering and go-to-market teams, including enterprise sales and customer success staff, to support deployments with manufacturers and distributors.

data.title: FedEx: Visibility, AI and rising buyer demands redefine B2B commerce
data.description: B2B purchasing behavior now closely mirrors consumer expectations, with buyers prioritizing speed, transparency and ease of use. Expectations increasingly include real-time shipment tracking and accurate delivery windows.

data.title: Walmart holds shoppable livestream at Winter Olympics in Milan
data.description: %%cf_subhead%% The livestream, featuring gold medalist Laurie Hernandez, fielded questions and features Procter & Gamble products sold at Walmart.

data.title: Watsco expands arsenal of digital, AI tools in Q4
data.description: On artificial intelligence, executives said Watsco has begun applying AI to pricing, customer engagement, and operational efficiency.

data.title: Deloitte: Digitally mature B2B suppliers post faster sales growth
data.description: Over the past two years, the average number of channels enabled increased 38%, rising to 4.7 channels in 2025 from 3.4 in 2023.
